name: recoil_state_confirm_quit_on_try_become_current
description: RecoilStateConfirmQuit::OnTryBecomeCurrent allocates and constructs the confirm-quit HUD background, stores it, enables it, and accepts the state transition.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison still fails for RecoilStateConfirmQuit::OnTryBecomeCurrent at 0x4158f0: 97 unmasked mismatches, 8 relocation bytes masked, 2 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 106 bytes, VC object symbol size 48 bytes.
The remaining binary drift is dominated by retail MSVC EH/new construction scaffolding not emitted by the current functional source shape.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x4158f0 validates allocating 0xabe4 bytes, calling HudUiBackgroundConfirmQuit::Constructor, storing the result in m_dialog, calling the dialog virtual SetEnabled(1), and returning 1.

The native smoke patches HudUiBackground::LoadFromZrd, BindWidgetByName, and FreeLoadedTreeRoots through the constructed dialog path, then verifies accepted transition result, non-null stored dialog, requested dialog.zrd/CONFIRM_QUIT load, OK_TO_QUIT and CANCEL_QUIT bindings, cleanup call, and initialized button ftables.
